528.text: A pair of guards at the armory are eager to show off an extensive collection of weapons. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 1231[/b].
Gain item [b]Item 959[/b].

choices.option: Teach the guards a new technique
choices.outcome: The impressed guards express their admiration, and they return the favor by sharing their craft with you. Gain ability [b]Item 1478[/b].

choices.option: Duel a guard in a card and dice game
choices.outcome: The water sentient’s eyes light up at the prospect of playing their favorite game. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1527[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

529.text: The husk shop owner is impressed—and a bit confused—to learn that unlike gold sentients, you didn’t choose your body. Choose one:

choices.option: Offer yourself as a research subject
choices.outcome: Gain $3.

choices.option: Force the owner to provide a husk upgrade for a gold sentient customer who is short on money
choices.outcome: The sentient is incredibly grateful that you stood up for them, and they offer you their allegiance. Gain sentient [b]Item 1324[/b].

choices.option: Duel the shop owner in a card and dice game
choices.outcome: The gold sentient’s eyes light up at the prospect of playing their favorite game. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1521[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

530.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] the nearby sentient in a card and dice game
530.text: The sentient’s eyes light up at the prospect of playing their favorite game. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1521[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

531.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] the nearby sentient in a card and dice game
531.text: The sand sentient’s eyes light up at the prospect of playing their favorite game. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1524[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

541.action: [ec1c3b]BREAK[-] an item free of the ruins
541.text: A torch is secured to the nearby column, so you snap it off. Gain item [b]Item 1085[/b].

542.action: [ec1c3b]BREAK[-] an item free of the ruins
542.text: A flute is secured to the nearby column, so you snap it off. Gain item [b]Item 949[/b].

543.action: [ec1c3b]BREAK[-] an item free of the ruins
543.text: A pair of shackles is secured to the central column, so you snap it off. Gain item [b]Item 937[/b].

544.action: [ec1c3b]BREAK[-] an item free of the ruins
544.text: A hammock is secured to two columns, so you tear it off. Gain item [b]Item 954[/b].

545.action: [ec1c3b]BREAK[-] an item free of the ruins
545.text: A carabiner is secured to the nearby column, so you snap it off. Gain item [b]Item 890[/b].

546.action: [ec1c3b]BREAK[-] an item free of the ruins
546.text: A water pouch is secured to the nearby column, so you snap it off. Gain item [b]Item 858[/b].

547.action: [ec1c3b]PLUCK[-] an item free of the ruins
547.text: Some mushrooms are growing from a nearby column, so you snap them off. Gain item [b]Item 1136[/b].

548.action: [ec1c3b]SHOVE[-] an item out of the ruins
548.text: A heavy barrel sits in the middle of the ruins, so you shove it onto its side and prepare to roll it away. Gain item [b]Item 1158[/b].

549.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the tent to gain the deadliest item inside
549.text: Wild mushrooms can be edible, but the worst of them can poison you within minutes. Gain item [b]Item 1136[/b] and exit to [b]Location 103[/b] before the occupants return.

550.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the tent to gain the deadliest item inside
550.text: The heat created by a torch is feared by some animals and sentients. Gain item [b]Item 1041[/b] and exit to [b]Location 131[/b] before the occupant returns.

551.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the tent to gain the deadliest item inside
551.text: Your mother once dispatched a burglar using a frying pan similar to this one. Gain item [b]Item 908[/b] and exit to [b]Location 225[/b] before the occupants return.

552.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the tent to gain the deadliest item inside
552.text: You’ve seen cowboys do quite a bit of damage with ropes like this. Gain item [b]Item 902[/b] and exit to [b]Location 294[/b] before the occupants return.

553.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the largest item
553.text: You muster the strength to carry a giant tome. Gain item [b]Item 1214[/b] and lurch outside (exit to [b]Location 115[/b]).

554.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the largest item
554.text: You muster the strength to climb into the mech suit. Gain vehicle [b]Item 984[/b] and lurch outside (exit to [b]Location 124[/b]).

555.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the largest item
555.text: You muster the strength to carry the staff. Gain item [b]Item 934[/b] and lurch outside through the window (exit west to [b]Location 128[/b]).

556.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the sturdiest item
556.text: You are pleased with the craftsmanship of the wok. Gain item [b]Item 907[/b] and tiptoe outside (exit to [b]Location 204[/b]).

557.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the bottle
557.text: A small sip confirms that you’re now in possession of some liquid courage. Gain item [b]Item 856[/b] and stride outside (exit to [b]Location 215[/b]).

558.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] a sentient in the card and dice game
558.text: Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1522[/b] as the opponent’s card. Then exit to [b]Location 271[/b].Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

559.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the largest item
559.text: You muster the courage to carry the serrated axe. Gain item [b]Item 1088[/b] and exit to [b]Location 408[/b].

560.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain a powerful item
560.text: You’ve seen the damage a pair of pliers can do to a finger. Gain item [b]Item 883[/b] and exit to [b]Location 673[/b].

561.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the largest item
561.text: You muster the strength to carry the time sieve. Gain item [b]Item 980[/b] and lurch outside (exit to [b]Location 760[/b]).

562.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
562.text: You muster the courage to wield the pikestaff: Gain item [b]Item 1229[/b] and exit to [b]Location 160[/b].

563.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior of the biggest item
563.text: You’re eager for the warmth of the snow gear you find in the shallow closet. Gain item [b]Item 928[/b], then choose one:

choices.option: Pay [a84fc0]1 look[-] or 2 boost to inspect the back of the closet
choices.outcome: A hidden panel pops loose, revealing the open door of an elevator. Choose either to enter the elevator (go to city [b]Location 041[/b]) or exit the hideout by shuffling through the clouds to location [b]Location 200[/b], [b]Location 201[/b], [b]Location 205[/b], [b]Location 393[/b], or [b]Location 706[/b].
Using no additional information, go to [b]Location 200[/b], [b]Location 201[/b], [b]Location 205[/b], [b]Location 393[/b], or [b]Location 706[/b].

564.action: [ec1c3b]SHATTER[-] the glass containing the deadliest item
564.text: Lose 1 health as the security system zaps you in the hand. You muster the courage to wield the flamethrower. Gain item [b]Item 962[/b] and exit to [b]Location 216[/b].

565.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the most powerful item
565.text: You muster the courage to wield the aether lantern. Gain item [b]Item 953[/b] and exit to [b]Location 239[/b].

566.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
566.text: You muster the courage to wield the sword. Gain item [b]Item 886[/b] and exit to [b]Location 304[/b].

choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 970[/b] and exit to [b]Location 321[/b].
Gain item [b]Item 1039[/b] and exit to [b]Location 321[/b].

568.text: You aggressively push the sentient aside and grab the vented jacket. Gain item [b]Item 967[/b] and curse [b]Item 1393[/b]; exit to [b]Location 333[/b].

569.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
569.text: You muster the courage to wield the pickaxe: Gain item [b]Item 896[/b] and exit to [b]Location 335[/b].

057.text: The monstrosity is as vile a beast as you’ve ever met, and you simply will not stand for it to continue to terrorize this planet. After a great battle, the kraken goes limp on the surface of the water, and you wipe bile and slime from your brow. Gain item [b]Item 1232[/b], ability [b]Item 1478[/b], and 3 morale, then roll a skill die and go to where the tides take you: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 056[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 059[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 429[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 480[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 448[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 362[/b]).

570.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior of the most useful item
570.text: You muster the courage to wield the ring. Gain item [b]Item 994[/b] and exit to [b]Location 338[/b].

571.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
571.text: You muster the courage to wield the grenade. Gain item [b]Item 860[/b] and exit to [b]Location 376[/b].

572.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior of the most dangerous item
572.text: You muster the courage to wield the portal generator. Gain item [b]Item 988[/b] and exit to [b]Location 396[/b].

573.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the house of the deadliest item
573.text: You muster the courage to wield the massive hammer. Gain item [b]Item 950[/b] and exit to [b]Location 410[/b].

574.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
574.text: You muster the courage to wield the scythe. Gain item [b]Item 938[/b] and exit to [b]Location 453[/b].

575.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
575.text: You muster the courage to wield the harpoon bow. Gain item [b]Item 960[/b] and go either back outside (exit to [b]Location 455[/b]) or into the city (exit to [b]Location 762[/b]).

576.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior of an item to protect you in combat
576.text: You wiggle into the light armor. Gain item [b]Item 974[/b] and exit to [b]Location 456[/b].

577.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
577.text: You muster the courage to wield the night-vision goggles. Gain item [b]Item 945[/b] and exit to [b]Location 464[/b].

578.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
578.text: You muster the courage to wield the harpoon. Gain item [b]Item 959[/b] and exit to [b]Location 497[/b].

579.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
579.text: You muster the courage to wield the force field. Gain item [b]Item 982[/b] and exit to [b]Location 499[/b].

580.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
580.text: You muster the courage to wield the time bomb. Gain item [b]Item 871[/b] and exit to [b]Location 613[/b].

581.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior of the most mysterious item
581.text: You muster the courage to wield the glowing box. Gain item [b]Item 1083[/b] and exit north to [b]Location 492[/b].

582.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
582.text: With so many weapons in one place, you must decide which is the best for you. Choose to gain the dynamite ([b]Item 877[/b]), the sword ([b]Item 887[/b]), or the trident (item [b]Item 1090[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 641[/b].

583.text: To the dismay of the council, you threaten them with violence and back out of the room with an item under your arm. Gain either the package (item [b]Item 1034[/b]) or the bodysuit (item [b]Item 965[/b]). Exit to [b]Location 777[/b].

584.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
584.text: You muster the courage to wield the snaptrap. Gain item [b]Item 923[/b] and exit to [b]Location 662[/b].

585.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
585.text: You muster the courage to wield the knife. Gain item [b]Item 1209[/b] and exit to [b]Location 676[/b].

586.text: The fruits and berries growing throughout the house look delicious. Gain item [b]Item 1224[/b] and exit to [b]Location 682[/b].

587.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
587.text: You muster the courage to wield the fish trap. Gain item [b]Item 910[/b] and exit to [b]Location 744[/b].

588.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the house to gain the deadliest item
588.text: You muster the courage to wield the sword. Gain item [b]Item 888[/b] and exit to [b]Location 737[/b].

589.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain a powerful item
589.text: Among the purple flowers you find a weapon made of bone. Gain item [b]Item 969[/b] and exit to [b]Location 763[/b].

590.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
590.text: You muster the courage to wield the machete. Gain item [b]Item 920[/b] and exit to [b]Location 769[/b].

591.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
591.text: You muster the courage to wield the sword. Gain item [b]Item 893[/b] and exit west to [b]Location 780[/b].

592.text: You wrestle the sentient to the ground, knocking the mace from their grasp. Feeling embarrassed, the sentient won’t explain the meaning of this place, so you take their mace. Gain item [b]Item 1036[/b] and exit to [b]Location 287[/b].

595.action: [ec1c3b]PLUCK[-] the prickly flower to clear the passage
595.text: You unearth the vegetation, shaking dirt from its roots. Gain flora [b]Item 1065[/b]. As you do, the slick, icy surface of the dungeon turns into easily traversable mush. Gain a random skill and go to the dungeon location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 598[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 599[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 014[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 017[/b]).

597.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the interior to gain the deadliest item
597.text: You muster the courage to wield the oil torch. Gain item [b]Item 1085[/b] and exit to [b]Location 305[/b].

599.text: As you pluck the flower, you realize that it’s quite sharp. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all [fff349]take[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [fff349]1 take[-]. Gain flora [b]Item 1079[/b] and continue.

601.text: You unearth the vegetation, shaking frost from the roots. Gain flora [b]Item 1065[/b].

602.text: After great resistance, the lock snaps open. Roll 5 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1090[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

603.text: The beast puts up a fight—its feathers are razor-sharp. You find its vulnerabilities and kill it. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1161[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1190[/b].

604.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] the hapless sentient in a card and dice game
604.text: The sentient perks up a little when you suggest that you play their favorite card and dice game. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1517[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

605.text: With their backs to you, the sentients are caught off guard by your attack, though they don’t give up without a fight. Gain a bow and arrow set (item [b]Item 956[/b]) and escape to the east or west.

606.text: The sentient, a skilled fighter, approaches the clash as if it were practice, frequently switching from one hand to the other. What they didn’t anticipate is that you are also ambidextrous. They blink, confused, as their weapons clatter to the ice. Gain item [b]Item 915[/b].

607.text: It’s no easy task to take down such a large animal, especially one with armor as skin. However, you have speed on your side. When the job is done, the smaller animals are nowhere to be seen—you have killed their mother. Lose 1 morale. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1160[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1190[/b].

608.text: The device is durable… but not that durable. Bits and pieces of circuitry scatter across the ice. Gain item [b]Item 1190[/b].

609.text: After great resistance, the lock snaps open. Roll 5 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1215[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1163[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

610.text: The long, sharp tusks of the beast are difficult to avoid, but you have superior training. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1160[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1186[/b].

611.action: [ec1c3b]SMASH[-] off a piece of the obelisk
611.text: Much to the horror of sentients in the area, you manage to break off a small piece of the obelisk. Gain item [b]Item 1160[/b] and curse [b]Item 1396[/b].

612.action: [ec1c3b]DIG[-] into the snowy patch at your feet
612.text: Several meters underground, you feel a sense of satisfaction and strength. Gain 1 health and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆2-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: A solid material halts your progress, and you excavate a lost purse full of coins (gain $10). You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆3-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result):
The earth beneath your feet gives way, sending you tumbling into the depths. Go to cave [b]Location 081[/b].

613.text: You begin to raze the device, and soon you find yourself in a scrap heap of metal and circuitry. The runecaster is now useless, but you’re impressed with how its creators took a naturally occurring phenomenon—runes— and produced a superior synthetic version. Gain 1 boost and your choice of a metal scrap (item [b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board (item [b]Item 1190[/b]).

614.action: [ec1c3b]RELIEVE[-] the sentient of the burden of immortality
614.text: The ancient being explains that their people have constantly upgraded and maintained their system, effectively preventing them from ever dying. They are grateful for the opportunity to “shed their cords”. As you sever their final lifeline, their eye drops into your arms. Gain item [b]Item 1012[/b].

615.text: You begin to raze the device, and soon you find yourself in a scrap heap of metal and circuitry. The runecaster is now useless, but you’re impressed with how its creators took a naturally occurring phenomenon—runes— and produced a superior synthetic version. Gain 1 boost and your choice of a metal scrap (item [b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board (item [b]Item 1190[/b]).

616.text: The circuit elemental paces before you with mild curiosity. First, gain curse [b]Item 1396[/b]. Then find elemental combat cards [b]Item 1537[/b]–[b]Item 1540[/b] and compile them into a cohesive image. Choose one of those cards and continue to perform an action on it.

617.action: [ec1c3b]CUT[-] the cord leading from the upright circuit board
617.text: You hear a squeal of anguish from the north. Gain ability [b]Item 1495[/b].

618.text: The masks don’t fight back because, well, they’re masks. All that remains are scattered circuit boards. Gain item [b]Item 1190[/b].

619.action: [ec1c3b]CUT[-] the cords leading from the sentient’s back
619.text: Fear ripples through the sentient as they flop helplessly on the ground. They beg for an act of mercy, offering you their loyalty if you reconnect a cord. If you do, gain sentient [b]Item 1310[/b]. If you don’t, gain item [b]Item 873[/b].

620.text: Freed from the box, the sentient expresses their gratitude with loyalty. Gain sentient [b]Item 1326[/b].

621.text: The judges gasp and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]MEMORIZE[/b][-] action.

622.text: You feel a wave of nausea wash over you as you attempt to strike the sentient—it’s as if they’ve found a way into your brain, and the only thing saving you is that they probably haven’t encountered any other human brains. You barely manage to overcome the sentient, the nausea abating as soon as you remove their helmet. Gain item [b]Item 1024[/b].

623.text: You unearth the vegetation, shaking dirt from the roots. The hologram sees what you’ve done and smites you. Gain flora [b]Item 1064[/b] and curse [b]Item 1396[/b].

624.text: The lights shatter in a burst of glass, and suddenly you can see a treasure chest lying at the base of the nearest column. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go north to [b]Location 629[/b].

choices.option: Perform an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆5-[b]FORCE[/b][-] action to open the chest
choices.outcome: Roll 5 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 996[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1161[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

625.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the area of the glowing shard
625.text: Much to the dismay of circuit sentients in the area, you forcibly remove the shard from its altar. The witnesses declare they will never forget this act of aggression. Gain item [b]Item 1009[/b] and curse [b]Item 1396[/b].

626.action: [ec1c3b]FORCE[-] a giant fan to jam and dart through the gap before anyone notices
626.text: You slip between the fan blades and into the manufacturing facility. Go to interior [b]Location 581[/b].

627.text: The guards try to stop you, but you push them aside. Go to city [b]Location 521[/b].

628.action: [ec1c3b]SMASH[-] the crystal free of the device
628.text: Much to the chagrin of the nearby farmer, you find yourself in possession of a massive purple crystal. Gain item [b]Item 1161[/b] and curse [b]Item 1396[/b].

629.text: You can’t help but take pity on the creature, and it sighs in relief when you demonstrate what you will do. Its carcass tumbles to the ground. Gain item [b]Item 1163[/b].

063.action: [ec1c3b]FISH[-] for a fresh catch in fertile waters
063.text: The fish are so abundant that they’re practically jumping into your arms. Roll 5 skill dice up to 5 times (always rolling all dice); roll 1 extra die if you pay a maximum of 1 boost from a food or flora. Based on number of [ec1c3b]overpower[-] in the final results, gain the following:After you fish, roll a skill die and go to where the tides take you: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 054[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 062[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 479[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 449[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 363[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 430[/b]).

choices.outcome: You don’t catch anything other than a brief glimpse of fish. Gain 1 boost.
Catch a small but savory fish; gain 1 health.
Catch a medium-sized fish; gain 1 health and 1 boost.
Catch a large fish; gain item [b]Item 1226[/b].
Catch a monstrosity; gain item [b]Item 1232[/b].

630.action: [ec1c3b]TARGET[-] the vehicle’s fuel core to knock it out of the air
630.text: The vehicle crashes into the snow, though it proves durable—the only damage is to the fuel core itself. Gain 1 morale. If you have a crystal, you may use it to reactivate the vehicle; if you do, gain vehicle [b]Item 1010[/b].

631.text: You notice movement in the seaweed, so you set a basic trap and wait for it to spring. Set 1 challenge die to time, morale, or health to represent the trap (read options below). Then roll 3 other challenge dice; if any of them match the set die, gain the resulting benefit once (if none match, gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] instead). These dice can come from the dice pool or the center; return them afterward.

choices.option: TIME (try to study an animal’s behavior)
choices.outcome: You observe the critter for a little while before setting it free. Gain 1 boost on your character and 1 boost on each water card.

choices.option: MORALE (try to gain an animal companion)
choices.outcome: The animal is scared but complacent. You will have to work to gain its trust. Gain animal [b]Item 847[/b].

choices.option: HEALTH (try to kill and eat an animal)
choices.outcome: The trap instantly kills the animal. Gain item [b]Item 1226[/b].

632.text: You slice cleanly through the thick stalk, trying to avoid the glowing bulbs. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [2694d0]1 move[-]. Gain flora [b]Item 1063[/b].

633.text: The fragile animal survives by letting vegetation protect it, and it’s no match for an aggressive hunter. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1164[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1212[/b].

634.text: You attach two pieces of sharp coral to a rod. Gain item [b]Item 1210[/b].

635.text: You unearth the vegetation, shaking sand from the roots. A nearby sentient sees what you’ve done and smites you. Gain flora [b]Item 1062[/b] and curse [b]Item 1385[/b].

636.action: [ec1c3b]SMASH[-] into the sentient to free them from the sea spout
636.text: Your selfless effort saves the sentient (gain 1 morale) but sends you rocketing out of the water. Roll a skill die and go to a location based on the result: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 476[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 361[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 667[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 434[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 649[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 752[/b]).

637.text: You unearth the vegetation, shaking dirt from the roots. Gain flora [b]Item 1048[/b].

638.action: [ec1c3b]PLUCK[-] the lotus, careful not to damage the roots or petals
638.text: You pluck the luminous flower. Gain flora [b]Item 1159[/b].

639.text: A solid material halts your progress, and you excavate a large crystal. Gain item [b]Item 1163[/b].

640.text: What starts as a fair fight between you and one water sentient becomes a full-on brawl when the other guard joins the fray. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Then go to interior [b]Location 582[/b].

641.text: The guards try to stop you, but you push them aside. Go to city [b]Location 528[/b].

642.text: As you approach the animal, you get a better sense of scale—you are but an ant to it. As you attack, sentients stream out of the animal’s mouth, desperately swimming toward the shore for air. Lose 1 morale. You may either stop or perform an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆5-[b]HUNT[/b][-] action to kill the animal.

choices.outcome: The animal acknowledges your contrition and bestows you with a token of its gratitude. Gain item [b]Item 1183[/b].
The beast goes limp, sinking to the depths. Its essence drifts on the tide into your mind. Gain spell [b]Item 1380[/b].

643.text: The slimy animal’s anatomy is largely unknown to you, so you target its head. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1160[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1183[/b].

644.text: Sparks fly as you carve a large gash in the ship, revealing precious cargo—your power armor. You may replace your character with the corresponding card ([2694d0]captain[-]: [b]Item 1447[/b]; [a84fc0]navigator[-]: [b]Item 1448[/b]; [fd8c46]scholar[-]: [b]Item 1449[/b]; [0b955e]medic[-]: [b]Item 1450[/b]; [fff349]engineer[-]: [b]Item 1451[/b]; [ec1c3b]marine[-]: [b]Item 1452[/b]); transfer all boost from your original character onto the new card. If you already have your power armor, instead gain 3 boost.

645.text: Against all odds, you prevail against this vastly more skilled warrior on their home turf. Gain item [b]Item 1038[/b], 1 morale, and 1 boost.

646.text: Despite their age, the sentient is a mighty warrior—to say nothing of their immense size. When they finally concede, they applaud your grit and admit that you have earned their respect. They bless you with honorary status among the water sentients. Gain item [b]Item 1249[/b] and $10.

647.action: [ec1c3b]FIGHT[-] your way through the gladiatorial tournament (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
647.text: Find card [b]Location 796[/b], place it on the table with a token in the upper left circle to represent you, and begin the tournament. At the beginning of each bout, roll 6 skill dice. You may reroll each [2694d0]move[-] by itself or with another die before finalizing the results. If you ever have a combination of at least [a84fc0]1 look[-] and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-], you win the current duel. Lose 1 health for each [fff349]take[-] unless you block it with an [fd8c46]engage[-] or [0b955e]help[-]. If you win the first bout, proceed to a bout against the sinew sentient. Otherwise you’re out of the tournament and gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] for the combat techniques you learned; lose card [b]Location 796[/b] (your location is still [b]Location 647[/b]).If you win the second bout, proceed to the finale against the water sentient. Otherwise you’re out of the tournament and gain 1 morale for the progress; lose card [b]Location 796[/b] (your location is still [b]Location 647[/b]).If you win the third bout, read entry [b]Location 647[/b] in the Book of Secrets. Otherwise you’re out of the tournament and gain 2 health from the medical team for the achievement; lose card [b]Location 796[/b] (your location is still [b]Location 647[/b]).

648.text: You unearth the vegetation, shaking dirt from the roots into the water. As you do, a blood-like substance spurts out of the plant, distracting the sharks. They don’t even notice you as you kick away; gain flora [b]Item 1061[/b], and you may continue.

649.text: Your mighty blow splits open the ship. Go to interior [b]Location 012[/b].

650.text: With the slightest leverage, you pin the sentient to the ocean floor. They’re too weak to struggle, and they whimper that not even their fellow water sentients will care that you’re treating them this way, as all they value is strength and aggression. Lose 1 morale and gain $10.

651.text: You attack before the animal can bite with those sharp rows of teeth. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1165[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1183[/b].

652.text: You stir up a frenzy of activity among the guards, who quickly surround you. It takes all your guile and power to knock them out so you can get into the pit, where you find a sentient huddled against the wall. Gain sentient [b]Item 1356[/b].

653.text: After great resistance, the lock snaps open. Roll 5 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1161[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 885[/b]. Otherwise, a trap springs from the chest, knocking the air from your lungs (suffer 1 hypoxia damage).

654.text: The gelatinous tendrils flail about as you try to slice through them, each a threat to sting you. Roll 1 skill die. For an [fd8c46]engage[-] or an [ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, suffer 1 heat damage as the anemones sting you. You may go north to [b]Location 479[/b].

655.action: [ec1c3b]WEAPONIZE[-] a beautiful tusk you find on the ledge
655.text: You attach the tusk to a makeshift handle, and the result is a sword you’re proud to carry. Gain item [b]Item 887[/b].

656.action: [ec1c3b]CHARGE[-] into the cave with your eyes closed
656.text: Splashing and scraping against the rough tunnel walls, you slam into a solid metal barrier, denting it. Lose 1 health and gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; go to cave [b]Location 032[/b].

657.text: The water elemental paces before you with mild curiosity. First, gain curse [b]Item 1385[/b]. Then find elemental combat cards [b]Item 1565[/b]–[b]Item 1568[/b] and compile them into a cohesive image. Choose one of those cards and continue to perform an action on it.

658.text: As you slice through the cord, there is a burst of bubbles from the depths, and an armored sentient darts upward. You may pay 2 boost to help them to the surface to the east (gain sentient [b]Item 1318[/b] and go to [b]Location 451[/b]). Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

659.text: The water sentient has a huge advantage underwater, but you surprise them with a series of pointed attacks. Having earned their respect, they offer you an item that drifted from the surface into the graveyard. Gain item [b]Item 1083[/b].

660.text: The creature is friendly, but it still has a strong survival instinct. You soon strike the killing blow. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1160[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1183[/b].

661.text: You notice movement in the grass, so you set a basic trap and wait for it to spring. Set 1 challenge die to time, morale, or health to represent the trap (read options below). Then roll 3 other challenge dice; if any of them match the set die, gain the resulting benefit once (if none match, gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] instead). These dice can come from the dice pool or the center; return them afterward.

choices.option: TIME (try to study an animal’s behavior)
choices.outcome: You observe the critter for a little while before setting it free. Gain 1 boost on your character and 1 boost on each water card.

choices.option: MORALE (try to gain an animal companion)
choices.outcome: The giant turtle is scared but complacent. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it.

choices.option: HEALTH (try to kill and eat an animal)
choices.outcome: The trap instantly kills the animal. Gain item [b]Item 1217[/b].

662.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] the occupants of the lodge in a card and dice game
662.text: The three sentients inside practically crawl over each other to be the first challenger. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1522[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

663.text: You manage to break open the lorestone. Embedded into the bottom half is an orange crystal. Gain item [b]Item 1162[/b].

664.text: You stand close to the gateway and toss a stone through it. It disappears into the void. Gain 1 boost and continue.

665.text: You notice movement in the brush, so you set a basic trap and wait for it to spring. Set 1 challenge die to time, morale, or health to represent the trap (read options below). Then roll 3 other challenge dice; if any of them match the set die, gain the resulting benefit once (if none match, gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] instead). These dice can come from the dice pool or the center; return them afterward.

choices.option: TIME (try to study an animal’s behavior)
choices.outcome: You observe the critter for a little while before setting it free. Gain 1 boost on your character and 1 boost on each wood card.

choices.option: MORALE (try to gain an animal companion)
choices.outcome: The animal is scared but complacent. You will have to work to gain its trust. Gain animal [b]Item 853[/b].

choices.option: HEALTH (try to kill and eat an animal)
choices.outcome: The trap instantly kills the animal. Gain item [b]Item 1217[/b].

666.action: [ec1c3b]CUT[-] down the tree; if you have the Tools of Creation, you may ignore the action cost and skip ahead to read the result below

choices.option: You don’t have the Tools of Creation
choices.outcome: The tree barks in agony as you cut it in half. Inside you find a glowing crystal, but you have a sense of despair as you look at the lifeless face splayed across the forest floor before you. Gain item [b]Item 1165[/b] and curse [b]Item 1386[/b].
After a few minutes of carving, a figure emerges from the tree, embraces you, and compliments your feet. Gain sentient [b]Item 1363[/b].

667.text: You can tell immediately that these sentients are not warriors. What you didn’t account for is the wild abandon with which the sentients would defend each other. Fortunately, they finally surrender. Gain item [b]Item 949[/b] and $6.

668.text: The creature isn’t much of a fighter, but it’s incredibly durable. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1164[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1180[/b].

669.text: You unearth the fungus, shaking dirt from the roots. Gain item [b]Item 1136[/b].

670.action: [ec1c3b]DIG[-] into the grassy patch under the runestone to find its source
670.text: Several meters underground, you feel a sense of satisfaction and strength. Gain 1 health and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆2-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: A solid material halts your progress, and you excavate a lost purse full of coins. Gain $10. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆3-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result only):

A rich, dark layer of sediment is prime for deep fungus. Gain item [b]Item 1136[/b]. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆4-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result):
The earth beneath your feet gives way, sending you tumbling into the depths. Go to cave [b]Location 089[/b].

671.action: [ec1c3b]DIG[-] into the grassy patch at your feet
671.text: Several meters underground, you feel a sense of satisfaction and strength. Gain 1 health and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆2-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: A solid material halts your progress, and you excavate a bag of coins and a card. Gain $3 and 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions). You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆3-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result only):

A rich, dark layer of sediment is prime for deep fungus. Gain item [b]Item 1136[/b]. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆4-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result):
The earth beneath your feet gives way, sending you tumbling into the depths. Go to cave [b]Location 088[/b].

672.text: Roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times (always rolling all dice); roll 1 extra die if you pay a maximum of 1 boost from a food or flora. Based on number of [ec1c3b]overpower[-] in the final results, gain the following:

choices.outcome: You don’t catch anything other than a brief glimpse of fish. Gain 1 boost.
Catch a small but savory fish; gain 1 health.
Catch a medium-sized fish; gain 1 health and 1 boost.
Catch a large fish; gain item [b]Item 1226[/b].
Catch a monstrosity; gain item [b]Item 1232[/b].

673.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] the sentient in a card and dice game
673.text: Their eyes light up at the prospect of playing their favorite game. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1528[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

674.text: This is a gentle beast, not prone to fighting, and its only defense is to swing its long limbs at you. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1163[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1224[/b]. Either way, gain curse [b]Item 1386[/b].

675.text: After great resistance, the lock snaps open. Roll 5 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 973[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions). Otherwise, gain $4.

676.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] the sentient in a card and dice game
676.text: The sentient wipes away tears and happily accepts your offer to play their favorite game. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1526[/b] as the opponent’s card. If you win, gain item [b]Item 1223[/b].Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

677.text: The guards try to stop you, but they offer little resistance. Go to city [b]Location 519[/b].

678.text: Normally this would be an easy battle, over in seconds. But the moose-like creature nearby joins the fray, and you struggle to overcome the two. As the sentient whimpers over the loss of their animal companion, you notice a wet crystal in the grass. Gain item [b]Item 1161[/b] and curse [b]Item 1386[/b].

679.text: Set 1 challenge die to time, morale, or health to represent the trap (read options below). Then roll 3 other challenge dice; if any of them match the set die, gain the resulting benefit once (if none match, gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] instead). These dice can come from the dice pool or the center; return them afterward.

choices.option: TIME (try to study an animal’s behavior)
choices.outcome: You observe the critter for a little while before setting it free. Gain 1 boost on your character and 1 boost on each leaf card.

choices.option: MORALE (try to gain an animal companion)
choices.outcome: The animal is scared but complacent. You will have to work to gain its trust. Gain animal [b]Item 843[/b].

choices.option: HEALTH (try to kill and eat an animal)
choices.outcome: The trap instantly kills the animal. Gain item [b]Item 1136[/b].

680.text: This creature isn’t made for combat, and it quickly succumbs to your attack. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1161[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1180[/b].

681.text: The thick strands are far more resilient than the thin webs you’ve seen on your home planet, and even a successful slice results in your arm getting caught in the web. You watch in horror as a mammoth spider descends upon you. Choose one action:

choices.outcome: You have the upper hand, even against such a dangerous creature. Gain item [b]Item 1164[/b]; you may go north to [b]Location 686[/b] or continue with a [2694d0]move[-] action for a different direction.

choices.option: [0b955e]help-◆2-[b]FEED[/b][-] the spider (only if you pay 1 boost from a food, animal, or sinew card)
choices.outcome: The beast greedily gobbles away while you either go north to [b]Location 686[/b] or continue with a [2694d0]move[-] action for a different direction.

682.text: You send the family running into the woods. Gain curse [b]Item 1386[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 586[/b]; on your next turn, you may not choose the [fd8c46]engage-[b]PERSUADE[/b][-] action there.

683.action: [ec1c3b]TARGET[-] the sentient from a safe distance
683.text: Your aim strikes true, and the sentient collapses on the branch. The commotion alerts a swarm of other sentients. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and watch as the sentients say goodbye to their brethren one by one.

choices.option: Swing over to the branch to take credit for the kill
choices.outcome: The sentients spite you for your unprovoked violence, but they do not turn to violence themselves. Instead, they file past you to press their hands against the dead sentient’s face. You soon notice that their distinct scents are mixing together to form a beautiful, mournful aroma. Gain 2 boost and curse [b]Item 1388[/b].

684.text: Back on the farm, you’ve seen how your chickens behave when there’s a fox in the henhouse. This is no different. As the giant beetle hidden on the tree attacks, you fend it off, finding a soft spot under its gaping jaw. Gain item [b]Item 1165[/b] and 1 morale; you may go north to [b]Location 689[/b].

685.text: You cleanly slice through the vine. Gain flora [b]Item 1059[/b].

686.text: The branches are quite pliable, and you can choose to use them to make either a spring trap (gain item [b]Item 926[/b]) or a bow and arrow set (gain item [b]Item 956[/b]). You may continue.

687.action: [ec1c3b]TARGET[-] a low-flying bird-like creature as it glides nearby
687.text: Your aim rings true and the bird plummets to the ground nearby. Gain item [b]Item 1186[/b] and continue.

688.action: [ec1c3b]STUN[-] a sentient as it emerges from the tower
688.text: A translucent pink sentient blinks into existence from one of the lights on the tower. You catch it off guard, slamming it to the ground. They beg for you to let them live, offering a lesson in magic in exchange. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain lesson [b]Item 1424[/b].
The allure of the sentient’s life force is too much for you to resist. They blink out of existence, and you lose 1 morale and gain 2 health.

689.action: [ec1c3b]CUT[-] off the branches and catch the cats as they fall
689.text: Cutting and catching is a precarious combo. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all [fff349]take[-] results. Unless you pay [fff349]1 take[-], you miss the cats as they fall, and they dash away into the forest (gain 1 boost). Otherwise gain animal [b]Item 827[/b].

690.text: You don’t meet any resistance at all as you tumble onto the grass on the other side. You have a good laugh at yourself. Gain 1 morale.

691.text: Piercing screams from throughout the forest disrupt the serene day as you slash one root after another. At the center of the roots is a massive shard (gain item [b]Item 1225[/b]). As you emerge from the roots, you find yourself surrounded by five warriors who target you in unison. Continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆5-[b]DEFEND[/b][-] action.

692.text: The beast roars in fury as you strike it, and it lashes at you with its trunk and tail. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1163[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1181[/b].

693.text: The judges gasp and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]SCALE[/b][-] action.

694.text: An arch crashes to the ground, much to the dismay of sentients in the area. Despite the disrespectful act, you’re happy to see that a water pouch detached from the column. Gain item [b]Item 858[/b] and curse [b]Item 1386[/b].

695.text: To your amazement, at the moment when your hands should have contacted the red-clothed figure, instead they pass through the air as if the Traveler isn’t there at all. They’re still quite aware of you, though, and they suggest you take such violence back to your home planet. “To the south of here are the remnants of ancient portals. Perhaps one of them, if activated, could take you back home.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1604[/b] (place it in the center).

696.action: [ec1c3b]PLUCK[-] the lotus, careful not to damage the roots or petals
696.text: You pluck the oversized flower. Gain flora [b]Item 1159[/b].

697.text: Sparks fly as you carve a large gash in the ship, revealing precious cargo—your power armor. You may replace your character with the corresponding card ([2694d0]captain[-]: [b]Item 1447[/b]; [a84fc0]navigator[-]: [b]Item 1448[/b]; [fd8c46]scholar[-]: [b]Item 1449[/b]; [0b955e]medic[-]: [b]Item 1450[/b]; [fff349]engineer[-]: [b]Item 1451[/b]; [ec1c3b]marine[-]: [b]Item 1452[/b]); transfer all boost from your original character onto the new card. If you already have your power armor, instead gain 3 boost.

698.text: Branches and vines whip your skin as you charge inside the overgrown cave entrance. One of those vines saves you from tumbling into the depths. Lose 1 health and gain [fff349]1 take[-]; go to cave [b]Location 038[/b].

699.action: [ec1c3b]CLEAVE[-] a tree to fall across the gully
699.text: There aren’t any trees right next to the gap, so you have to drag the trunk to create a bridge. Gain $2 from grateful locals wanting an easier path north to the capital city. You may go north to [b]Location 779[/b] (if you do, gain [0b955e]2 help[-] from the runecaster on the far side of the gully).

700.text: Several meters underground, you feel a sense of satisfaction and strength. Gain 1 health and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆2-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result):

choices.outcome: A solid material halts your progress, and you excavate a large crystal. Gain item [b]Item 1160[/b] and continue.

701.text: You don’t fully understand how the box works, but you use some of its strange power to make a weapon. Gain item [b]Item 1151[/b].

702.action: [ec1c3b]PLUCK[-] the lotus while keeping the spider-crab behind it at bay
702.text: The animal whimpers as you gain flora [b]Item 1159[/b].

703.action: [ec1c3b]ATTACK[-] the sentient, who introduces themselves as the King of Souls
703.text: You charge the sentient, aiming for the joints that hold together their rocky appendages. It is a fierce battle, every blow generating a shower of sparks, but you prevail. Gain item [b]Item 1261[/b]; the sentient weakly highlights your current location (view page 18 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region J).

704.text: The orb is surprisingly durable, but you manage to crack and break it. Gain item [b]Item 1194[/b].

705.text: The beast’s combination of legs for days, spikes, and giant claws make it a formidable opponent. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1162[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1179[/b].

706.text: You can’t help but take pity on the creature, and it sighs in relief when you demonstrate what you will do. Its eyes close for the last time. You may either eat it to gain 1 health or bury it to gain 1 morale.

707.text: You notice movement in the grass, so you set a basic trap and wait for it to spring. Set 1 challenge die to time, morale, or health to represent the trap (read options below). Then roll 3 other challenge dice; if any of them match the set die, gain the resulting benefit once (if none match, gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] instead). These dice can come from the dice pool or the center; return them afterward.

choices.option: TIME (try to study an animal’s behavior)
choices.outcome: You observe the critter for a little while before setting it free. Gain 1 boost on your character and 1 boost on each wind card.

choices.option: MORALE (try to gain an animal companion)
choices.outcome: The animal is scared but complacent. You will have to work to gain its trust. Gain animal [b]Item 840[/b].

choices.option: HEALTH (try to kill and eat an animal)
choices.outcome: The trap instantly kills the animal. Gain item [b]Item 1217[/b].

708.text: You swiftly upend your attacker, pinning them to the ground. “Please help my child,” they gasp. “North in the…” They pass out from exhaustion. Gain item [b]Item 884[/b].

709.action: [ec1c3b]BREAK[-] off a piece of the blue crystal
709.text: A large chunk snaps off in your hands. Gain item [b]Item 1160[/b] and continue.

710.action: [ec1c3b]CUT[-] a staircase into the cliff to provide an accessible entrance and exit to the valley below
710.text: Other travelers, having gathered at the ledge to admire the famous view, appreciate the effort by giving you a special pair of glasses. Gain item [b]Item 925[/b]; you may go north to [b]Location 711[/b].

711.action: [ec1c3b]RELIEVE[-] the old animal from its burden
711.text: You can’t help but take pity on the creature, and it sighs in relief when you demonstrate what you will do. Its carcass tumbles to the ground. You may either eat it to gain 1 health or bury it to gain 1 morale. If you pay 1 boost, also gain item [b]Item 1165[/b].

712.text: You begin to raze the device, and soon you find yourself in a scrap heap of metal and circuitry. The runecaster is now useless, but you’re impressed with how its creators took a naturally occurring phenomenon—runes— and produced a superior synthetic version. Gain 1 boost and your choice of a metal scrap (item [b]Item 1184[/b]) or a circuit board (item [b]Item 1190[/b]).

713.text: Sparks fly as you carve a large gash in the ship, revealing precious cargo—your power armor. You may replace your character with the corresponding card ([2694d0]captain[-]: [b]Item 1447[/b]; [a84fc0]navigator[-]: [b]Item 1448[/b]; [fd8c46]scholar[-]: [b]Item 1449[/b]; [0b955e]medic[-]: [b]Item 1450[/b]; [fff349]engineer[-]: [b]Item 1451[/b]; [ec1c3b]marine[-]: [b]Item 1452[/b]); transfer all boost from your original character onto the new card. If you already have your power armor, instead gain 3 boost.

714.text: You instantly find yourself knocked off your feet by a giant mace made of clouds. While the sentient gathers more white billows, you strike, upending your opponent on the grass. They yield and offer you the secret to their magic if you’ll leave them alone. Gain spell [b]Item 1379[/b].

715.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] the sentient in a card and dice game
715.text: The sentient welcomes the challenge and awes you with their shuffling skills. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1525[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

716.text: In the pitch-black darkness of the cave, you crash into a solid stone wall. Lose 1 health and gain [a84fc0]2 look[-]; go to cave [b]Location 024[/b].

717.text: You unearth the vegetation, shaking dirt from its roots. A nearby sentient sees what you’ve done and smites you. Gain flora [b]Item 1047[/b] and curse [b]Item 1389[/b].

718.text: Seeing your first strike, the sentient holds up their arms as if to say, “This isn’t what I intended,” but it’s too late. You land the perfect blow, striking them backwards off the cliff. The sentient dangles from the edge with one hand. Choose one:

choices.outcome: They fall to their death, making eye contact the entire way. Lose 2 morale.
They nearly wrench your arm from its socket as you drag them to safety. Lose 1 health and gain sentient [b]Item 1345[/b].

719.action: [ec1c3b]WEAPONIZE[-] the abundant strings at the peak
719.text: You cut free the strings, braiding them into a thick rope. Gain item [b]Item 905[/b].

720.text: Several meters underground, you feel a sense of satisfaction and strength. Gain 1 health and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆2-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: A solid material halts your progress, and you excavate a large crystal. Gain item [b]Item 1160[/b]. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆3-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result):
The earth beneath your feet gives way, sending you tumbling into the depths. Go to cave [b]Location 097[/b].

721.text: The judges gasp and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]CALCULATE[/b][-] action.

722.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] a passing sentient in a card and dice game
722.text: Their eyes light up at the prospect of playing their favorite game. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1525[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

723.text: You manage to cleave the lorestone from its levitating perch. Embedded into the bottom half is an orange crystal. Gain item [b]Item 1162[/b].

724.text: After great resistance, the lock snaps open. Unfortunately, the commotion awakens the nearby stoneskin lizard. It pounces on you, scattering the chest’s contents across the crag. Lose 1 health, roll 5 skill dice, and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Choose one:

choices.option: You may pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] to fight back
choices.outcome: Gain the glowing crystal found in the attacker’s carcass (item [b]Item 1164[/b]).
Gain 1 boost and go to an adjacent listed location.

725.text: You notice movement in the tall grass, so you set a basic trap and wait for it to spring. Set 1 challenge die to time, morale, or health to represent the trap (read options below). Then roll 3 other challenge dice; if any of them match the set die, gain the resulting benefit once (if none match, gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] instead). These dice can come from the dice pool or the center; return them afterward.

choices.option: TIME (try to study an animal’s behavior)
choices.outcome: You observe the critter for a little while before setting it free. Gain 1 boost on your character and 1 boost on each energy card.

choices.option: MORALE (try to gain an animal companion)
choices.outcome: The animal is scared but complacent. You will have to work to gain its trust. Gain animal [b]Item 822[/b].

choices.option: HEALTH (try to kill and eat an animal)
choices.outcome: The trap instantly kills the animal. Gain item [b]Item 1211[/b].

726.text: You withstand blow after blow until you find the creature’s weakness, striking it from above until it surrenders. The sentients applaud your courage and give you some gifts. Gain item [b]Item 876[/b] and 1 morale.

727.action: [ec1c3b]PLUCK[-] a flower on your way into the city
727.text: You unearth the vegetation, shaking dirt from its roots. A nearby sentient sees what you’ve done and smites you. Gain flora [b]Item 1056[/b] and curse [b]Item 1389[/b].

728.action: [ec1c3b]SUBDUE[-] the sentient, preventing them from jumping
728.text: The sentient grunts in frustration as you pin them to the ground. They explain that they’re training for a “leap of faith” to the west to honor their lost pet—it’s an act that requires courage, but the low gravity of the cloudy canyon ensures their safety. Gain 1 morale, 1 boost, and quest [b]Item 1650[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

729.text: The stone elemental paces before you with mild curiosity. First, gain curse [b]Item 1389[/b]. Then find elemental combat cards [b]Item 1561[/b]–[b]Item 1564[/b] and compile them into a cohesive image. Choose one of those cards and continue to perform an action on it.

730.text: You barrel through several guards and crash into a pedestal. Boulders tumble around you, and you have to make a split-second decision. Choose one:Exit the cave and go east ([b]Location 414[/b]) or west ([b]Location 724[/b]).Lose 1 health and gain [fff349]1 take[-]; go to cave [b]Location 020[/b].

731.text: Sparks fly as you carve a large gash in the ship, revealing precious cargo—your power armor. You may replace your character with the corresponding card ([2694d0]captain[-]: [b]Item 1447[/b]; [a84fc0]navigator[-]: [b]Item 1448[/b]; [fd8c46]scholar[-]: [b]Item 1449[/b]; [0b955e]medic[-]: [b]Item 1450[/b]; [fff349]engineer[-]: [b]Item 1451[/b]; [ec1c3b]marine[-]: [b]Item 1452[/b]); transfer all boost from your original character onto the new card. If you already have your power armor, instead gain 3 boost.

732.text: You could be at home right now with your family and your cats, but instead you are here, trapped on this planet because of this accursed signal. This is the source of the signal that brought you to this planet in the first place, and you take out your frustrations on the antenna. You have successfully cut off the signal that led you to this planet. Gain 2 morale.

733.text: You take aim at the pearl and try to knock it off its levitating axis. While you are perfectly accurate, the pearl itself is immune to your weapons, and your destructive act only serves to anger nearby sentients. Gain 1 boost and curse [b]Item 1388[/b].

734.text: You toss a flaming coconut through the rift and see it land on a bridge similar to the one you’re standing near. Suddenly, your bridge vanishes into thin air. You may not move west from this location. Gain 1 boost.

735.text: The sentient doesn’t fight back, but the interruption clearly annoys them. Gain $3 and curse [b]Item 1390[/b].

736.action: [ec1c3b]TARGET[-] a low-flying bird-like creature as it drifts over the glass
736.text: Your aim rings true and the bird plummets to the sand nearby. The combination of the sun and reflective glass cook the bird, sizzling like fried chicken. Gain 1 morale and 1 health; continue.

737.text: The resident is too distraught to stop you. Gain ability [b]Item 1467[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 588[/b].

738.text: You attract some glares from the tourists, but no one tries to stop you. Go to city [b]Location 527[/b].

739.text: You bash your way onto the island, cutting through the dense jungle until you reach a stolen mech. Three pirate guards attack you with glee. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Gain vehicle [b]Item 984[/b].

740.action: [ec1c3b]DIG[-] into the grassy patch at your feet
740.text: Several meters underground, you feel at peace. Gain 1 health and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆2-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: A solid material halts your progress, and you unearth some coins. Gain $5. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆3-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result only):

A rich, dark layer of sediment is prime for deep fungus. Gain item [b]Item 1136[/b]. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆4-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result):
The earth beneath your feet gives way. Go to cave [b]Location 091[/b].

741.text: Several meters underground, you feel a sense of satisfaction and strength. Gain 1 health and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆2-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: A solid material halts your progress, and you excavate a dusty tome. Gain item [b]Item 1191[/b]. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆3-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result only):

A rich, dark layer of sediment is prime for deep fungus. Gain item [b]Item 1136[/b]. You may either stop or continue with an [ec1c3b]overpower-◆4-[b]DIG[/b][-] action to go deeper (then read the next result):
The earth beneath your feet gives way, sending you tumbling into the depths. Go to cave [b]Location 091[/b].

742.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] the sentient in a card and dice game
742.text: Their eyes light up at the prospect of playing their favorite game. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1524[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

743.text: Fighting wasn’t the sentient’s intent, but they shrug and nonchalantly fight back. They have a huge advantage in the water, so you work your way closer to the shore and finally overcome them. They actually seem happy about the outcome, congratulating you as a peer. Gain sentient [b]Item 1359[/b] and 1 morale.

744.action: [ec1c3b]SUBDUE[-] the sentients so you can do as you wish to their hut
744.text: Gain curse [b]Item 1386[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 587[/b].

745.text: Roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times (always rolling all dice); roll 1 extra die if you pay a maximum of 1 boost from a food or flora. Based on number of [ec1c3b]overpower[-] in the final results, gain the following:

choices.outcome: You don’t catch anything other than a brief glimpse of fish. Gain 1 boost.
Catch a small but savory fish; gain 1 health.
Catch a medium-sized fish; gain 1 health and 1 boost.
Catch a large fish; gain item [b]Item 1226[/b].
Catch a monstrosity; gain item [b]Item 1232[/b].

746.text: Vacation homes like this don’t come cheap, so you have high hopes for your plunder. If you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-], gain item [b]Item 1018[/b]. Otherwise, gain item [b]Item 955[/b].

747.text: The tiny beast darts this way and that as you strike, baring sharp teeth in fear as you strike the killing blow. If you pay 1 boost, gain item [b]Item 1164[/b] from the carcass. If not, gain item [b]Item 1194[/b].

748.text: The guards try to stop you, but you easily push them aside. Go to city [b]Location 531[/b].

749.action: [ec1c3b]PLUCK[-] the lotus, careful not to damage the roots or petals
749.text: You pluck the sizable flower. Gain flora [b]Item 1159[/b].

750.text: You position yourself between the locals and the kraken, and you fight as if you had eight arms. The kraken, defeated but alive, slinks away. The locals cheer the victory and reward you handsomely. Gain item [b]Item 899[/b], 1 morale, and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-].

751.action: [ec1c3b]FIGHT[-] the young sentient playfully, using a stick as your “weapon”
751.text: You playfully pull every punch and exaggerate every blow they land, finally falling to the sand in mock defeat. The child dances triumphantly with their pet before declaring you their squire. Gain 1 morale and quest [b]Item 1643[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

752.text: The sand elemental paces before you with mild curiosity. First, gain curse [b]Item 1390[/b]. Then find elemental combat cards [b]Item 1557[/b]–[b]Item 1560[/b] and compile them into a cohesive image. Choose one of those cards and continue to perform an action on it.

753.text: An alarm sounds, and several riders fan out in a well-practiced formation around you while the others scatter. You’re clearly not the first bandit they’ve had to fight. The riders retreat, leaving a well-crafted skiff as your prize. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1022[/b] and curse [b]Item 1390[/b].

754.text: The judges gasp and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]SPEED[/b][-] action.

755.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] the sentient in a card and dice game
755.text: The wood sentient wipes away tears and welcomes the distraction. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1528[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

756.text: After great resistance, the lock snaps open. Roll 4 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1189[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

757.text: Stumbling through the waterfall and scraping against the wet tunnel walls, you crash into a solid metal gate, leaving a slight dent. Lose 1 health, gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-], and go to cave [b]Location 023[/b].

758.text: You can’t help but take pity on the creature, and it sighs in relief when you demonstrate what you will do. Its carcass tumbles to the sand. You notice a red glow in its soft underbelly, and after a slight incision, a large crystal plops into your outstretched arms. Gain item [b]Item 1165[/b].

759.text: After the younger sentient gains approval from their instructor, they face off with you. As fierce as they look, they’re not an experienced warrior, and you easily defeat them. The elder sentient offers you a choice of rewards: The staff (gain item [b]Item 934[/b]), their tutelage (gain sentient [b]Item 1343[/b]), or a taste of magic (gain lesson [b]Item 1433[/b]).

076.action: [ec1c3b]PLUCK[-] a wind chime from the ceiling
076.text: You feel an odd sense of control over the air within the chime. Gain item [b]Item 1212[/b] and continue.

760.text: You haven’t chosen a side, so you plow through until you find yourself alone in a quiet room. Go to interior [b]Location 561[/b].

761.text: A lone guard tries to stop you, but you push them aside. Go north to [b]Location 762[/b].

762.action: [ec1c3b]SUBDUE[-] the sentient, finding that they are less ghost-like than they appear
762.text: The sentient struggles, but they’re not a fighter. They beg for mercy, citing their responsibility to the egg-hatching community. Gain $3; you may refresh up to 3 challenge dice from your cards.

763.text: Your aggression leaves confused and angry sentients in your wake. Gain curse [b]Item 1395[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 589[/b].

764.action: [ec1c3b]SUBDUE[-] a large sentient who’s had too much to drink
764.text: The other sentients express their gratitude by carrying you on their shoulders down the street. Gain 2 morale and go north to [b]Location 765[/b].

765.action: [ec1c3b]FORCE[-] an airship captain to fly you out of the city
765.text: “Where to, sir?” they ask, trembling. “Three clicks should be safe.” You may land exactly 3 locations away in any direction: north ([b]Location 175[/b]), east ([b]Location 783[/b]), south ([b]Location 762[/b]), or west ([b]Location 753[/b]).

766.text: Air gushing from a large hole, the vessel spirals downward and wedges into a narrow alley. You realize they don’t know who shot them down, so you appear at the crash site as a savior. Gain sentient [b]Item 1307[/b].

767.text: You notice movement in the brush, so you set a basic trap and wait for it to spring. Set 1 challenge die to time, morale, or health to represent the trap (read options below). Then roll 3 other challenge dice; if any of them match the set die, gain the resulting benefit once (if none match, gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] instead). These dice can come from the dice pool or the center; return them afterward.

choices.option: TIME (try to study an animal’s behavior)
choices.outcome: You observe the critter before setting it free. Gain 1 boost on your character and 1 boost on each wind card.

choices.option: MORALE (try to gain an animal companion)
choices.outcome: The animal is scared but complacent. You will have to work to gain its trust. Gain animal [b]Item 803[/b].

choices.option: HEALTH (try to kill and eat an animal)
choices.outcome: The trap instantly kills the animal. Gain item [b]Item 1217[/b].

768.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] the sentient to the right in a card and dice game
768.text: The wood sentient’s eyes light up at the prospect of playing their favorite game. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1528[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

769.text: The sentient almost immediately pins you to the ground, and you just barely wiggle free to put up a proper fight that eventually results in the surprised sentient tied to a stone column. With grudging respect, they ask that you not tell any of their friends inside the tavern and instead proceed to the stables, where you’re welcome to help yourself to a machete. Gain 1 morale and go to interior [b]Location 590[/b].

077.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] the sentients in one of two ways

choices.outcome: You strike quickly before the sentients have much time to react. When the dust clears, you’ve knocked one sentient and their weapon down to the level below, and you have the remaining sentient’s crossbow. They offer to accompany you to the top level if you return their weapon. Either gain item [b]Item 1152[/b] and exit to [b]Location 346[/b], or gain sentient [b]Item 1309[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 078[/b].

choices.option: Duel the sentients in a card and dice game
choices.outcome: The sentients are alarmed to find you in the room, but when they see your interest in their game, they usher you over and deal you in. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1518[/b] as the opponent’s card. If you win, the sentients grant you access to the top level of the building (go to interior [b]Location 078[/b]). If you lose, exit to [b]Location 346[/b] and continue.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

770.text: Roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times (always rolling all dice); roll 1 extra die if you pay a maximum of 1 boost from a food or flora. Based on number of [ec1c3b]overpower[-] in the final results, gain the following:

choices.outcome: You don’t catch anything other than a brief glimpse of fish. Gain 1 boost.
Catch a small but savory fish; gain 1 health.
Catch a medium-sized fish; gain 1 health and 1 boost.
Catch a large fish; gain item [b]Item 1226[/b].
Catch a monstrosity; gain item [b]Item 1232[/b].

771.text: Roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times (always rolling all dice); roll 1 extra die if you pay a maximum of 1 boost from a food or flora. Based on number of [ec1c3b]overpower[-] in the final results, gain the following:

choices.outcome: You don’t catch anything other than a brief glimpse of fish. Gain 1 boost.
Catch a small but savory fish; gain 1 health.
Catch a medium-sized fish; gain 1 health and 1 boost.
Catch a large fish; gain item [b]Item 1226[/b].
Catch a monstrosity; gain item [b]Item 1232[/b].

772.text: The sentient has a massive advantage in the water, and it’s a battle you can’t win, but you realize that winning isn’t the goal. Rather, you’re earning the respect of the sentient and that of the ship’s crew. At long last the sentient backs away, grinning. “If it means that much to you, the ship can pass and you can join them,” they say. “Or I can join you.” Choose the ship (gain vehicle [b]Item 1015[/b]) or the sentient (gain sentient [b]Item 1355[/b]).

773.action: [ec1c3b]DIG[-] under the wall near the tiny gate
773.text: You can’t fit through the gateway, but the soft soil underneath is easily scooped away, and you crawl forward into the city. Go north to [b]Location 774[/b].

774.text: The world seems to slow as the sentient reaches for an axe. Before they arm themselves, you’ve pinned them to the ground, burning your arm in the process. Suffer 1 heat damage and gain item [b]Item 872[/b].

775.text: You have the upper hand at first, but the broad-shouldered sentient seems more amused than bothered. When you tumble to a stop, they chuckle and help you to your feet. It seems that it isn’t often that someone pokes the beast, and they ask whether you’d like to accompany them on a dangerous quest. If you accept, gain sentient [b]Item 1334[/b] and quest [b]Item 1635[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

776.text: The vendor cowers in the corner as you tear outfits from the rafters. You stumble over a heavy package and pick it up as you walk away. Gain item [b]Item 1034[/b] and curse [b]Item 1389[/b].

777.text: The big sentient makes for an easy target, though a force field deflects the blow. They swoop over to you and ask for identification. You introduce yourself as they scan you. Choose one:

choices.option: If you have any metal composition cards or you pay $2
choices.outcome: The guard escorts you as a speaker to the Council of Elders. Go to interior [b]Location 583[/b].

choices.option: If you don’t have any metal composition cards (or choose to hide them) and do not pay
choices.outcome: The guard nudges you off the path to make room for “more dignified attendees”. Gain 1 boost.

778.text: The fruit has a chance of tasting good. Roll 2 skill dice up to 2 times. If the results include at least [0b955e]1 help[-], gain item [b]Item 1224[/b] and 1 health. Otherwise lose 1 health.

779.action: [ec1c3b]WEAPONIZE[-] the vines growing along the wall
779.text: The rushing water reminds you of fishing trips back home. There are no fish in the waterfall, but you weave the nearby vines into a fishing net to use later. Gain item [b]Item 911[/b] and continue.

078.text: You wrestle the sentient to the ground, nearly burning your hands on their scalding hot husk. The sentient begs for mercy, asking you to rescue them from captivity. Gain [0b955e]3 help[-] and continue.

780.text: You notice movement in the bushes, so you set a basic trap and wait for it to spring. Set 1 challenge die to time, morale, or health to represent the trap (read options below). Then roll 3 other challenge dice; if any of them match the set die, gain the resulting benefit once (if none match, gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] instead). These dice can come from the dice pool or the center; return them afterward.

choices.option: TIME (try to study an animal’s behavior)
choices.outcome: You observe the critter for a little while before setting it free. Gain 1 boost on your character and 1 boost on each wood card.

choices.option: MORALE (try to gain an animal companion)
choices.outcome: The animal is scared but complacent. You will have to work to gain its trust. Gain animal [b]Item 1221[/b].

choices.option: HEALTH (try to kill and eat an animal)
choices.outcome: The trap instantly kills the animal. Gain item [b]Item 1217[/b].

781.action: [ec1c3b]SUBDUE[-] the offensive sentient on the right
781.text: As you pin them down, the other sentient plucks a large metal plate from their grasp. They thank you with hefty reward and heaps of praise. Gain $10 and 1 morale.

choices.outcome: The sentient is easily overcome. Gain $5.

choices.option: Attack the purple sentient on the ledge
choices.outcome: They are focused on the green sentient, and you catch them off guard. They promise to leave the other sentient alone, and you send them dashing away in fear. Relieved, the green sentient communicates to you in a series of scents that somehow make sense to you. They were being chased, and you saved them. They offer to join you as a friend. Gain sentient [b]Item 1353[/b].

783.action: [ec1c3b]DUEL[-] the sentient in a card and dice game
783.text: The gold sentient’s eyes light up at the prospect of playing their favorite game. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions, using card [b]Item 1521[/b] as the opponent’s card.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

784.text: The stone crashes to the ground, much to the dismay of sentients in the area. Despite the disrespectful act, you’re happy to see an ornate wand shining from the dust. Gain item [b]Item 981[/b] and curse [b]Item 1388[/b].

785.text: The crowded bridge makes for an easy target… though so do you. You’re pelted with stones from above. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [2694d0]1 move[-]. You dart under the bridge and find a quiet path running along the base of the city wall. Go northeast to [b]Location 389[/b].

786.action: [ec1c3b]CHARGE[-] past the guards and don’t stop until you can no longer hear them
786.text: The guards apparently rely on intimidation and not on speed. Go to interior [b]Location 591[/b].

787.action: [ec1c3b]SHOVE[-] the sentient as they zoom by
787.text: You send the sentient sprawling over the cobblestone street, and they skid to a stop against a building. They glare at you, but they seem to have dislocated something, as they make no move to defend themselves. Choose one:

choices.option: Rip a device off their belt
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 860[/b] and curse [b]Item 1391[/b].

choices.option: Apologize and reset their dislocated joint
choices.outcome: They thank you profusely and offer to share a copy of the map they’re planning to steal. They rush away to the north, and a few minutes later they return with a map. Gain item [b]Item 1264[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 21 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region I).

788.text: The sentient is not impressed with your use of brute force, but you still gain item [b]Item 1264[/b].

789.text: A merchant like this isn’t trained in the art of combat, and you quickly overwhelm them. “Please,” they beg, “take these coins and leave me be.” Gain $8.

079.text: The boulder crashes into another boulder, causing a domino effect of destruction. When the dust clears, you have a clear path to the base of the pillar. Go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 046[/b].

790.text: A nice rope on the tree caught your eye, and now it’s yours. Gain item [b]Item 901[/b].

791.text: The vines wrap around every inch of the ship, including the blinking radio and the cryogenic chambers. You slice through the radio, and the signal goes dead. You have cut off the signal that led you to this planet. Gain item [b]Item 1181[/b] and exit to [b]Location 732[/b].

795.text: You smash through the glass to your right, grabbing the sentient and slamming them to the ground. Caught completely off guard, they surrender and beg for mercy, offering you their weapon in return. Gain item [b]Item 1153[/b] and exit to [b]Location 281[/b].
