799.text: You dig through bones, sand, and water to reach safety. Gain 1 health and exit to [b]Location 346[/b].

080.text: You wrestle the sentient to the ground, knocking the blowtorch from their grasp. The molten gold is too hot to touch, so you claim the tool instead. Gain item [b]Item 870[/b].

801.action: [ec1c3b]RAID[-] the sky island of the shard
801.text: You swagger across the island as if you own the place and grab the shard. Gain item [b]Item 1707[/b].

081.action: [ec1c3b]DIG[-] through the glowing dead end in the rear of the cavern
081.text: Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 015[/b]; keep this location for reference.

082.text: Wielding a cold stalagmite, you shatter the ice, brittle shards spraying across the cavern. The crystal breaks free, but the stream is no longer passable. Gain item [b]Item 1160[/b]; you may no longer move north from this location.

083.action: [ec1c3b]DIG[-] through the glowing dead end in the rear of the cavern
083.text: Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 016[/b]; keep this location for reference.

084.action: [ec1c3b]TARGET[-] a small yellow crystal growing on the ceiling of the cavern
084.text: Your aim rings true, and you catch the crystal as it falls. Gain item [b]Item 1164[/b] and 1 random skill. You may continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]BALANCE[/b][-] action.

085.text: Find card [b]Location 797[/b] (it’s a large card), which shows a bracket of 8 fighters. You will take the place of the fighter in the bottom right (use X instead of 1; ignore the coin multipliers). The numbers in hexes represent each fighter’s strength (the number of skill dice the fighter will roll in each head-to-head bout). Run the tournament by rolling skill dice for each fighter and comparing the results. The winner of each bout is the fighter with more [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results (the fighter with the lower strength breaks ties thanks to crowd support). If you lose a bout, you’re out of the tournament. When the tournament ends, win or lose, read entry [b]Location 085[/b] in the Book of Secrets.

086.action: [ec1c3b]DISLODGE[-] the crystal from the magma stream
086.text: You knock the crystal free of the deadly magma, and it floats over to you. Gain item [b]Item 1162[/b].

087.text: With a mighty roar, you slash your way through the mine, cutting free bewildered workers and upending guards. You grab a pickaxe and follow a group of miners deeper into the planet. Gain item [b]Item 896[/b] and go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 049[/b].

870.text: Choose one: Refresh 1 challenge die from your grid, gain [a84fc0]1 look[-], or add 1 boost to an egg. Also, if you have a wood resource ([b]Item 1180[/b]), you may lose it to gain a bramble torch ([b]Item 1084[/b]).

872.action: [ec1c3b]CLEAVE[-] a stone (if on a location with nearby rocks)

873.text: Choose one: Refresh 1 challenge die from your grid, gain [a84fc0]1 look[-], or add 1 boost to an egg. Also, if you have a wood resource ([b]Item 1180[/b]), you may lose it to gain a bramble torch ([b]Item 1084[/b]).

088.action: [ec1c3b]DIG[-] through the glowing sediment to the right
088.text: Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 017[/b]; keep this location for reference.

089.action: [ec1c3b]DIG[-] through the glowing dead end in the rear of the cavern
089.text: The soil breaks away easily, revealing a deeper area to explore. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 018[/b]; keep this location for reference.

090.text: As you scoop aside jewelry and coins, you find a hidden doorway. You may open it; if you do, advance deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 593[/b]; keep this location for reference.

091.text: The chest bursts open; gain item [b]Item 1036[/b] and 1 boost. Unfortunately, the noise attracts the attention of the nearby serpent, which slithers toward you at breakneck speed. You must immediately perform one of these actions:

choices.outcome: Go to cave [b]Location 031[/b].

When you defeat the monster, you find a large seed (gain item [b]Item 1020[/b]) gleaming from the broken chest nearby. As you pick it up, you notice a passage leading deeper into the planet. You may go to dungeon [b]Location 594[/b] (keep this location for reference) or go back to cave [b]Location 031[/b].

910.action: [ec1c3b]FISH[-] for food (use only on a location with water)
910.text: Roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times (always rolling all dice); roll 1 extra die per boost you pay from this trap, plus 1 extra die if you pay a maximum of 1 boost from a food or flora. Based on number of [ec1c3b]overpower[-] in the final results, gain the following:

choices.outcome: You don’t catch anything other than a brief glimpse of fish. Gain 1 boost.
Catch a small but savory fish; gain 1 health.
Catch a medium-sized fish; gain 1 health and 1 boost.
Catch a large fish; gain item [b]Item 1226[/b].
Catch a monstrosity; gain item [b]Item 1232[/b].

095.text: You guiltily admit that the smell of fried eggs makes your stomach growl. Then you realize it’s not just your stomach that’s growling—a massive animal has emerged from the cave. You must immediately perform one of these actions:

choices.outcome: Go to cave [b]Location 035[/b].

The fleshy, long-limbed animal collapses to the cavern floor, and you grab a yellow crystal from its carcass (item [b]Item 1164[/b]). The light from the crystal reveals a passage leading from the back of the cave. Proceed deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 596[/b]; keep this location for reference.

096.text: An epic battle ensues, and a part of you feels bad for the creature of legend as you strike the final blow. You’re excited about the treasure you find deep in the cave, though; gain item [b]Item 1045[/b]. If you pay 1 boost, also gain item [b]Item 1160[/b] from the carcass.

962.text: Choose one: Refresh 1 challenge die from your grid, gain [a84fc0]1 look[-], or add 1 boost to an egg. Also, if you have a wood resource ([b]Item 1180[/b]), you may lose it to gain a bramble torch ([b]Item 1084[/b]).

097.text: With reckless abandon, you unleash fury onto the devices, leaving behind a trail of circuits, panels, and wires. The toxic energy subsides, replaced with a far more powerful substance. Gain item [b]Item 865[/b] and 1 morale. Ignore further hypoxia damage on this location from now on.
